                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Total linear momentum   | $\mathbf{P} = M_{total}\mathbf{V}$                                                                                 | $\mathbf{P}$: Total linear momentum, $M_{total}$: total mass, $\mathbf{V}$: velocity of CM.                                                               | kg m/s                       | To relate the total linear momentum of a system to its centre of mass velocity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Confusing linear momentum for a single particle vs. a system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Acceleration of CM      | $\mathbf{A} = \frac{d\mathbf{V}}{dt} = \frac{\sum m_i \mathbf{a}_i}{M_{total}}$                                        | $\mathbf{A}$: Acceleration of CM, $m_i$: mass of $i^{th}$ particle, $\mathbf{a}_i$: acceleration of $i^{th}$ particle, $M_{total}$: total mass.                 | m/s²                         | To find the overall translational acceleration of a system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Using external forces for individual particles instead of internal forces.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         **Meaning:** The angular acceleration rate of change of a physical quantity from one value to another is defined as a vector and its quantity is represented with units of radians per second squared. |
| Speed ($v$)             | $v = \frac{ds}{dt}$                                                                                               | $v$: speed, $ds$: infinitesimal linear displacement, $dt$: infinitesimal time interval.                                                     | m/s                                | To describe how fast an object is moving linearly.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Confusing speed (scalar) with velocity (vector).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Angular acceleration ($\alpha$) | $\alpha = \frac{d\omega}{dt}$                                                                                                   | $\alpha$: angular acceleration, $\omega$: angular velocity, $t$: time.                                                                       | rad/s²                               | When the angular velocity is changing.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Confusing with linear acceleration. Not using angular units for calculations.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Angular Acceleration (vector) | $\boldsymbol{\alpha} = \frac{d\boldsymbol{\omega}}{dt}$ (Direction along axis of rotation)                           | $\boldsymbol{\alpha}$: Angular acceleration vector, $\boldsymbol{\omega}$: angular velocity vector, $t$: time.                                            | rad/s²                               | To describe the rate of change of angular velocity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Incorrectly applying right-hand rule for direction, especially if $\boldsymbol{\omega}$ is decreasing (direction is opposite to $\boldsymbol{\omega}$).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| $F_{ext} = MA$          | Sum of External Forces = Mass x Acc. of CM                                                                                | $\mathbf{F}_{ext}$: Total external force, $M$: total mass, $\mathbf{A}$: acceleration of CM.                                                               | Newton (N)                           | To determine the translational acceleration of the CM of a system/rigid body. Used when considering only the translational motion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Forgetting to consider *only external* forces. Applying this for rotational motion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| $v = \omega r$          | $v$: linear speed, $\omega$: angular speed, $r$: perpendicular distance from axis of rotation.                          | m/s                                | To relate linear speed to angular speed for a particle in circular motion (part of a rotating rigid body). $r$ is often denoted as $r_\perp$.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Using general position vector $\mathbf{r}$ instead of perpendicular distance $r_\perp$ from axis. Applying this for objects not in circular motion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| $M \mathbf{A} = \mathbf{F}_{ext}$ | $M$: Total mass, $\mathbf{A}$: Acceleration of CM, $\mathbf{F}_{ext}$: Sum of all external forces.                                     | kg m/s² (N)                          | To find the acceleration of the system's CM due to external forces. This is Newton's Second Law for a system of particles.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Including internal forces in $\mathbf{F}_{ext}$. Confusing with rotational equivalent ($\tau = I\alpha$).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Sum of External Forces = Total linear momentum of the system | $\mathbf{F}_{ext} = \frac{d\mathbf{P}}{dt}$                                                                       | $\mathbf{F}_{ext}$: Total external force, $\mathbf{P}$: Total linear momentum, $t$: time.                                                | Newton (N)                           | To relate net external force to the rate of change of total linear momentum. General form of Newton's 2nd Law for a system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Forgetting that internal forces do not contribute to $\mathbf{F}_{ext}$.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Average Angular Speed ($\omega_{avg}$) | $\omega_{avg} = \frac{\Delta\theta}{\Delta t}$                                                                          | $\Delta\theta$: change in angular displacement, $\Delta t$: time interval.                                                                 | rad/s                        | To calculate the average rate of rotation over a time interval.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Not using radians for angle.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Angular velocity (scalar) | $\omega = \frac{d\theta}{dt}$                                                                                                 | $\omega$: angular speed, $\theta$: angular position, $t$: time.                                                                              | rad/s                        | To describe the rate of rotation about a fixed axis.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Confusing with angular *velocity* vector. Not using radians.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Kinematics (Constant $\alpha$)** | **Linear**                        | **Rotational (Fixed Axis)**
